milestones.title: First Stock Purchase at Age 11
milestones.description: Purchased first stock (Cities Service Preferred), demonstrating early interest in investing

evidence.snippet: Buffett bought his first stock at age 11

milestones.title: Founded Buffett Partnership Ltd
milestones.description: Established his first investment partnership in Omaha, Nebraska

evidence.snippet: In 1956, Buffett founded Buffett Partnership Ltd
